+#!/bin/bash
+# =============================================================================
+# archive-completed.sh - Archive completed tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
+# =============================================================================
+# Archives [x] tasks and RESOLVED GAPs to dated folder to reduce file size.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             # Archive completed tasks
+#   ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --dry-run   # Preview changes
+#   ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --phase 3   # Archive specific phase
+#   ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --all       # Archive everything completed
+#   ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --help      # Show help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Files
+PLAN_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"
+ARCHIVE_BASE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE"
+
+# Options
+DRY_RUN=false
+PHASE=""
+ARCHIVE_ALL=false
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+archive-completed.sh - Archive completed tasks from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh             Archive all completed tasks
+  ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --dry-run   Preview changes without modifying files
+  ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --phase N   Archive completed tasks from phase N only
+  ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --all       Archive all completed items (tasks + resolved GAPs)
+  ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh --help      Show this help
+
+Output:
+  Creates dated folder: ralph/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD/
+  With files: completed-tasks.md, resolved-gaps.md, summary.txt
+EOF
+}
+
+parse_args() {
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            --dry-run)
+                DRY_RUN=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            --phase)
+                PHASE="$2"
+                shift 2
+                ;;
+            --all)
+                ARCHIVE_ALL=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            *)
+                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
+                show_help
+                exit 1
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+}
+
+extract_completed_tasks() {
+    local content="$1"
+    local phase_filter="$2"
+
+    if [[ -n "$phase_filter" ]]; then
+        # Extract tasks with [x] from specific phase section
+        echo "$content" | grep -E "^\s*-\s*\[x\].*[Pp]hase\s*$phase_filter" || true
+        echo "$content" | grep -E "^\s*-\s*\[x\].*P${phase_filter}-" || true
+    else
+        # Extract all tasks with [x]
+        echo "$content" | grep -E "^\s*-\s*\[x\]" || true
+    fi
+}
+
+extract_resolved_gaps() {
+    local content="$1"
+    local in_gap=false
+    local gap_content=""
+    local resolved_gaps=""
+
+    while IFS= read -r line; do
+        if [[ "$line" =~ ^###.*GAP-[0-9]+.*RESOLVED ]] || [[ "$line" =~ ^###.*GAP-[0-9]+.*✅ ]]; then
+            if [[ -n "$gap_content" ]]; then
+                resolved_gaps+="$gap_content"
+            fi
+            gap_content="$line"$'\n'
+            in_gap=true
+        elif [[ "$in_gap" == true ]]; then
+            if [[ "$line" =~ ^### ]] || [[ "$line" =~ ^## ]]; then
+                resolved_gaps+="$gap_content"$'\n'
+                gap_content=""
+                in_gap=false
+            else
+                gap_content+="$line"$'\n'
+            fi
+        fi
+    done <<< "$content"
+
+    if [[ -n "$gap_content" ]]; then
+        resolved_gaps+="$gap_content"
+    fi
+
+    echo "$resolved_gaps"
+}
+
+remove_archived_content() {
+    local input_file="$1"
+    local tasks_to_remove="$2"
+    local gaps_to_remove="$3"
+    local output_file="$4"
+
+    local content
+    content=$(cat "$input_file")
+
+    # Remove completed tasks line by line
+    while IFS= read -r task; do
+        [[ -z "$task" ]] && continue
+        # Use grep -v with fixed string
+        content=$(echo "$content" | grep -v -F -- "$task" 2>/dev/null || echo "$content")
+    done <<< "$tasks_to_remove"
+
+    # Remove resolved GAP sections
+    if [[ -n "$gaps_to_remove" ]]; then
+        while IFS= read -r gap_header; do
+            [[ -z "$gap_header" ]] && continue
+            if [[ "$gap_header" =~ ^###.*GAP-[0-9]+ ]]; then
+                # Remove the entire GAP section using awk
+                content=$(echo "$content" | awk -v header="$gap_header" '
+                    BEGIN { skip=0 }
+                    $0 == header { skip=1; next }
+                    /^###/ || /^## / { if(skip) skip=0 }
+                    !skip { print }
+                ')
+            fi
+        done <<< "$(echo "$gaps_to_remove" | grep -E '^###.*GAP-[0-9]+' || true)"
+    fi
+
+    echo "$content" > "$output_file"
+}
+
+main() {
+    parse_args "$@"
+
+    # Validate plan file exists
+    if [[ ! -f "$PLAN_FILE" ]]; then
+        log_error "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md not found at: $PLAN_FILE"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    # Get original line count
+    local original_lines
+    original_lines=$(wc -l < "$PLAN_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
+
+    # Read plan content
+    local content
+    content=$(cat "$PLAN_FILE")
+
+    # Extract completed tasks
+    local completed_tasks
+    completed_tasks=$(extract_completed_tasks "$content" "$PHASE")
+
+    # Extract resolved GAPs if --all
+    local resolved_gaps=""
+    if [[ "$ARCHIVE_ALL" == "true" ]]; then
+        resolved_gaps=$(extract_resolved_gaps "$content")
+    fi
+
+    # Count items
+    local task_count=0
+    local gap_count=0
+
+    if [[ -n "$completed_tasks" ]]; then
+        task_count=$(echo "$completed_tasks" | grep -c '^\s*-' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+    fi
+
+    if [[ -n "$resolved_gaps" ]]; then
+        gap_count=$(echo "$resolved_gaps" | grep -c '^###.*GAP' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+    fi
+
+    if [[ $task_count -eq 0 && $gap_count -eq 0 ]]; then
+        log_info "No completed tasks or resolved GAPs to archive"
+        exit 0
+    fi
+
+    log_info "Found $task_count completed tasks and $gap_count resolved GAPs"
+
+    # Prepare archive directory
+    local today
+    today=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+    local archive_dir="$ARCHIVE_BASE/$today"
+
+    if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == "true" ]]; then
+        echo ""
+        log_info "DRY RUN - Would create: $archive_dir/"
+        echo ""
+        if [[ -n "$completed_tasks" ]]; then
+            echo "=== Completed Tasks ==="
+            echo "$completed_tasks"
+            echo ""
+        fi
+        if [[ -n "$resolved_gaps" ]]; then
+            echo "=== Resolved GAPs ==="
+            echo "$resolved_gaps"
+        fi
+        echo ""
+        log_info "Plan would be reduced from $original_lines lines"
+        exit 0
+    fi
+
+    # Create archive directory
+    mkdir -p "$archive_dir"
+
+    # Write completed tasks
+    if [[ $task_count -gt 0 ]]; then
+        {
+            echo "# Archived Completed Tasks"
+            echo ""
+            echo "> Archived: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+            echo ""
+            echo "$completed_tasks"
+        } > "$archive_dir/completed-tasks.md"
+        log_success "Created $archive_dir/completed-tasks.md"
+    fi
+
+    # Write resolved GAPs
+    if [[ $gap_count -gt 0 ]]; then
+        {
+            echo "# Archived Resolved GAPs"
+            echo ""
+            echo "> Archived: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+            echo ""
+            echo "$resolved_gaps"
+        } > "$archive_dir/resolved-gaps.md"
+        log_success "Created $archive_dir/resolved-gaps.md"
+    fi
+
+    # Backup original
+    cp "$PLAN_FILE" "$PLAN_FILE.bak"
+
+    # Remove archived content from plan
+    remove_archived_content "$PLAN_FILE" "$completed_tasks" "$resolved_gaps" "$PLAN_FILE.tmp"
+    mv "$PLAN_FILE.tmp" "$PLAN_FILE"
+
+    # Get new line count
+    local new_lines
+    new_lines=$(wc -l < "$PLAN_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
+
+    # Write summary
+    {
+        echo "Archive Summary"
+        echo "==============="
+        echo "Date: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+        echo "Tasks archived: $task_count"
+        echo "GAPs archived: $gap_count"
+        echo "Plan reduced: $original_lines -> $new_lines lines"
+    } > "$archive_dir/summary.txt"
+
+    log_success "Archived $task_count tasks and $gap_count GAPs"
+    log_success "Plan reduced from $original_lines to $new_lines lines"
+    log_info "Archive location: $archive_dir/"
+    log_info "Backup created: $PLAN_FILE.bak"
+}
+
+main "$@"

+#!/bin/bash
+# =============================================================================
+# check-context.sh - Check token budget of key Ralph files
+# =============================================================================
+# Validates that IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md and AGENTS.md stay within token limits.
+# Token estimation: words × 1.3
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh           # Check all files
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh --help    # Show help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Files and token limits
+PLAN_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"
+AGENTS_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/AGENTS.md"
+
+PLAN_TOKEN_LIMIT=15000
+AGENTS_TOKEN_LIMIT=2000
+
+# Token multiplier (words × 1.3)
+TOKEN_MULTIPLIER="1.3"
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[OK]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+check-context.sh - Check token budget of key Ralph files
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh         Check all files
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh --help  Show this help
+
+Token Limits:
+  IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: 15,000 tokens (max)
+  AGENTS.md: 2,000 tokens (max)
+
+Token Estimation:
+  words × 1.3 (approximate LLM tokenization)
+
+Exit Codes:
+  0  All files within limits
+  1  One or more files exceed limits
+
+Examples:
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-context.sh
+EOF
+}
+
+estimate_tokens() {
+    local file="$1"
+    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
+        echo "0"
+        return
+    fi
+    local word_count
+    word_count=$(wc -w < "$file" | tr -d ' ')
+    # Use bc for floating point, round to integer
+    echo "$word_count * $TOKEN_MULTIPLIER / 1" | bc
+}
+
+check_file() {
+    local file="$1"
+    local limit="$2"
+    local name
+    name=$(basename "$file")
+
+    if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
+        log_warn "$name: File not found"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    local tokens
+    tokens=$(estimate_tokens "$file")
+
+    if [[ $tokens -gt $limit ]]; then
+        log_warn "$name: ~$tokens tokens (exceeds $limit)"
+        if [[ "$name" == "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]]; then
+            log_info "Consider running: ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh"
+        elif [[ "$name" == "AGENTS.md" ]]; then
+            log_info "Consider trimming operational notes from AGENTS.md"
+        fi
+        return 1
+    else
+        log_success "$name: ~$tokens tokens (OK, max: $limit)"
+        return 0
+    fi
+}
+
+main() {
+    # Parse args
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            *)
+                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
+                show_help
+                exit 1
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+
+    echo "Context Budget Check:"
+    echo ""
+
+    local exit_code=0
+
+    # Check IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
+    if ! check_file "$PLAN_FILE" "$PLAN_TOKEN_LIMIT"; then
+        exit_code=1
+    fi
+
+    # Check AGENTS.md
+    if ! check_file "$AGENTS_FILE" "$AGENTS_TOKEN_LIMIT"; then
+        exit_code=1
+    fi
+
+    echo ""
+    if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
+        log_success "All files within token budget"
+    else
+        log_warn "Some files exceed token budget"
+    fi
+
+    exit $exit_code
+}
+
+main "$@"

+#!/bin/bash
+# =============================================================================
+# check-plan-size.sh - Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size
+# =============================================================================
+# Warns if plan exceeds threshold, suggests archiving completed tasks.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh                # Check with default threshold (400)
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300  # Custom threshold
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         # Exit 1 if exceeded
+#   ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --help         # Show help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Files
+PLAN_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"
+
+# Options
+WARN_AT=400
+FAIL_ON_EXCEED=false
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[OK]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+check-plan-size.sh - Validate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md size
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh                Check with default threshold (400 lines)
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at N    Use custom warning threshold
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail         Exit with code 1 if threshold exceeded
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --help         Show this help
+
+Exit Codes:
+  0  Plan is under the threshold (or --fail not specified)
+  1  Plan exceeds threshold (when --fail is used)
+
+Examples:
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --warn-at 300
+  ./ralph/scripts/check-plan-size.sh --fail --warn-at 500
+EOF
+}
+
+parse_args() {
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            --warn-at)
+                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]] || ! [[ "$2" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+                    log_error "--warn-at requires a positive integer"
+                    exit 1
+                fi
+                WARN_AT="$2"
+                shift 2
+                ;;
+            --fail)
+                FAIL_ON_EXCEED=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            *)
+                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
+                show_help
+                exit 1
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+}
+
+main() {
+    parse_args "$@"
+
+    # Validate plan file exists
+    if [[ ! -f "$PLAN_FILE" ]]; then
+        log_error "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md not found at: $PLAN_FILE"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    # Count lines
+    local line_count
+    line_count=$(wc -l < "$PLAN_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
+
+    # Check threshold
+    if [[ $line_count -gt $WARN_AT ]]; then
+        log_warn "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: $line_count lines (exceeds $WARN_AT)"
+        log_info "Suggestion: Run ./ralph/scripts/archive-completed.sh"
+
+        if [[ "$FAIL_ON_EXCEED" == "true" ]]; then
+            exit 1
+        fi
+    else
+        log_success "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md: $line_count lines (OK, max: $WARN_AT)"
+    fi
+}
+
+main "$@"

+# focus.sh - Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md
+# =============================================================================
+# Adds a session focus marker at the top of PROMPT_build.md to steer Ralph
+# toward specific work during the current session.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 only"  # Add focus
+#   ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show                      # Show current focus
+#   ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove                    # Remove focus
+#   ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --help                      # Show help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Files
+PROMPT_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/PROMPT_build.md"
+BACKUP_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/.PROMPT_build.md.bak"
+
+# Signpost markers
+SIGNPOST_START="## SESSION FOCUS (Remove when complete)"
+SIGNPOST_END="---"
+
+# Options
+SHOW=false
+REMOVE=false
+FOCUS=""
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+focus.sh - Add/remove session focus signposts in PROMPT_build.md
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Focus description"  Add session focus
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --show               Show current focus
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --remove             Remove current focus
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh --help               Show this help
+
+Examples:
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Complete Phase 7.2 UI components only"
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Fix all TypeScript errors before any features"
+  ./ralph/scripts/focus.sh "Work on P1 tasks until ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE"
+
+Notes:
+  - Focus is added to the TOP of PROMPT_build.md
+  - Original file is backed up to .PROMPT_build.md.bak
+  - Only one focus can be active at a time
+  - Remove focus when the session goal is complete
+EOF
+}
+
+parse_args() {
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            --show|-s)
+                SHOW=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            --remove|-r)
+                REMOVE=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            *)
+                if [[ -z "$FOCUS" ]]; then
+                    FOCUS="$1"
+                else
+                    FOCUS="$FOCUS $1"
+                fi
+                shift
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+}
+
+has_focus() {
+    grep -q "^$SIGNPOST_START" "$PROMPT_FILE" 2>/dev/null
+}
+
+get_current_focus() {
+    if has_focus; then
+        # Extract the focus description (line after the header)
+        awk "/$SIGNPOST_START/{found=1; next} found && /^This session:/{print; exit}" "$PROMPT_FILE" | sed 's/^This session: //'
+    fi
+}
+
+show_focus() {
+    if has_focus; then
+        local focus
+        focus=$(get_current_focus)
+        log_info "Current session focus:"
+        echo ""
+        echo "  $focus"
+        echo ""
+    else
+        log_info "No session focus currently set"
+    fi
+}
+
+remove_focus() {
+    if ! has_focus; then
+        log_info "No session focus to remove"
+        return 0
+    fi
+
+    # Backup original
+    cp "$PROMPT_FILE" "$BACKUP_FILE"
+
+    # Remove signpost block (from SIGNPOST_START to first ---)
+    awk -v start="$SIGNPOST_START" '
+        BEGIN { skip=0 }
+        $0 == start { skip=1; next }
+        skip && /^---$/ { skip=0; next }
+        !skip { print }
+    ' "$BACKUP_FILE" > "$PROMPT_FILE"
+
+    # Remove leading blank lines
+    sed -i.tmp '/./,$!d' "$PROMPT_FILE" 2>/dev/null || sed -i '' '/./,$!d' "$PROMPT_FILE"
+    rm -f "$PROMPT_FILE.tmp"
+
+    log_success "Session focus removed"
+    log_info "Backup saved to: $BACKUP_FILE"
+}
+
+add_focus() {
+    local focus_text="$1"
+
+    if [[ -z "$focus_text" ]]; then
+        log_error "Focus description is required"
+        echo ""
+        show_help
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    # If focus already exists, remove it first
+    if has_focus; then
+        log_info "Replacing existing focus..."
+        remove_focus
+    fi
+
+    # Backup original
+    cp "$PROMPT_FILE" "$BACKUP_FILE"
+
+    # Create signpost block
+    local signpost
+    signpost=$(cat << EOF
+$SIGNPOST_START
+
+This session: $focus_text
+
+$SIGNPOST_END
+
+EOF
+)
+
+    # Prepend to file
+    echo "$signpost" | cat - "$PROMPT_FILE" > "$PROMPT_FILE.tmp"
+    mv "$PROMPT_FILE.tmp" "$PROMPT_FILE"
+
+    log_success "Session focus added"
+    log_info "Focus: $focus_text"
+    log_info "Backup saved to: $BACKUP_FILE"
+}
+
+main() {
+    parse_args "$@"
+
+    # Validate prompt file exists
+    if [[ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]]; then
+        log_error "PROMPT_build.md not found at: $PROMPT_FILE"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "$SHOW" == "true" ]]; then
+        show_focus
+    elif [[ "$REMOVE" == "true" ]]; then
+        remove_focus
+    elif [[ -n "$FOCUS" ]]; then
+        add_focus "$FOCUS"
+    else
+        show_focus
+    fi
+}
+
+main "$@"

+#!/bin/bash
+# =============================================================================
+# refresh-plan.sh - Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs
+# =============================================================================
+# Implements the "disposable plans philosophy" - plans can be regenerated from
+# specs at any time. Current plan is archived before regeneration.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                    # Archive and regenerate
+#   ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings   # Preserve learnings section
+#   ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive          # Archive only (no regeneration)
+#   ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --help             # Show help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Files
+PLAN_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"
+LEARNINGS_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/LEARNINGS.md"
+ARCHIVE_BASE="$RALPH_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE"
+
+# Options
+KEEP_LEARNINGS=false
+ARCHIVE_ONLY=false
+ITERATIONS=3
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+refresh-plan.sh - Regenerate IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md from specs
+
+Implements the "disposable plans philosophy" - plans can be safely regenerated
+from specs because the specs are the source of truth.
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh                    Archive current plan and regenerate
+  ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --keep-learnings   Preserve the learnings section during regeneration
+  ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --archive          Archive only (do not regenerate)
+  ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --iterations N     Number of planning iterations (default: 3)
+  ./ralph/scripts/refresh-plan.sh --help             Show this help
+
+Process:
+  1. Archive current plan to IMPLEMENTATION_ARCHIVE/YYYY-MM-DD-pre-refresh.md
+  2. (Optional) Extract and preserve learnings section
+  3. Run ./ralph/loop.sh plan <iterations> to regenerate
+  4. (Optional) Append preserved learnings to new plan
+
+Exit Codes:
+  0  Successful refresh
+  1  Error during refresh
+EOF
+}
+
+parse_args() {
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            --keep-learnings)
+                KEEP_LEARNINGS=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            --archive)
+                ARCHIVE_ONLY=true
+                shift
+                ;;
+            --iterations)
+                if [[ -z "${2:-}" ]] || ! [[ "$2" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
+                    log_error "--iterations requires a positive integer"
+                    exit 1
+                fi
+                ITERATIONS="$2"
+                shift 2
+                ;;
+            *)
+                log_error "Unknown option: $1"
+                show_help
+                exit 1
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+}
+
+extract_learnings() {
+    local content="$1"
+    local in_learnings=false
+    local learnings=""
+
+    while IFS= read -r line; do
+        if [[ "$line" =~ ^##[[:space:]]+Learnings ]] || [[ "$line" =~ ^##[[:space:]]+Source[[:space:]]+Research ]]; then
+            in_learnings=true
+            learnings+="$line"$'\n'
+        elif [[ "$in_learnings" == true ]]; then
+            if [[ "$line" =~ ^##[[:space:]] ]] && ! [[ "$line" =~ ^##[[:space:]]+Learnings ]] && ! [[ "$line" =~ ^##[[:space:]]+Source ]]; then
+                break
+            fi
+            learnings+="$line"$'\n'
+        fi
+    done <<< "$content"
+
+    echo "$learnings"
+}
+
+archive_plan() {
+    local today
+    today=$(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+    local timestamp
+    timestamp=$(date +%H%M%S)
+    local archive_file="$ARCHIVE_BASE/${today}-pre-refresh-${timestamp}.md"
+
+    mkdir -p "$ARCHIVE_BASE"
+
+    {
+        echo "# Pre-Refresh Archive"
+        echo ""
+        echo "> Archived: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
+        echo "> Reason: Plan refresh via refresh-plan.sh"
+        echo ""
+        echo "---"
+        echo ""
+        cat "$PLAN_FILE"
+    } > "$archive_file"
+
+    log_success "Archived current plan to: $archive_file"
+    echo "$archive_file"
+}
+
+main() {
+    parse_args "$@"
+
+    # Validate plan file exists
+    if [[ ! -f "$PLAN_FILE" ]]; then
+        log_error "IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md not found at: $PLAN_FILE"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    # Get original line count
+    local original_lines
+    original_lines=$(wc -l < "$PLAN_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
+    log_info "Current plan: $original_lines lines"
+
+    # Archive current plan
+    local archive_path
+    archive_path=$(archive_plan)
+
+    if [[ "$ARCHIVE_ONLY" == "true" ]]; then
+        log_success "Archive complete. Plan preserved at original location."
+        exit 0
+    fi
+
+    # Extract learnings if requested
+    local preserved_learnings=""
+    if [[ "$KEEP_LEARNINGS" == "true" ]]; then
+        log_info "Extracting learnings section..."
+        local content
+        content=$(cat "$PLAN_FILE")
+        preserved_learnings=$(extract_learnings "$content")
+        if [[ -n "$preserved_learnings" ]]; then
+            local learnings_lines
+            learnings_lines=$(echo "$preserved_learnings" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
+            log_success "Preserved $learnings_lines lines of learnings"
+        else
+            log_warn "No learnings section found to preserve"
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    # Run plan mode to regenerate
+    log_info "Regenerating plan from specs (${ITERATIONS} iterations)..."
+    log_info "Running: ./ralph/loop.sh plan ${ITERATIONS}"
+    echo ""
+
+    if ! "$RALPH_DIR/loop.sh" plan "$ITERATIONS"; then
+        log_error "Plan regeneration failed"
+        log_info "Original plan preserved at: $archive_path"
+        exit 1
+    fi
+
+    echo ""
+
+    # Append preserved learnings if any
+    if [[ -n "$preserved_learnings" ]]; then
+        log_info "Appending preserved learnings..."
+        echo "" >> "$PLAN_FILE"
+        echo "---" >> "$PLAN_FILE"
+        echo "" >> "$PLAN_FILE"
+        echo "$preserved_learnings" >> "$PLAN_FILE"
+        log_success "Learnings section restored"
+    fi
+
+    # Report results
+    local new_lines
+    new_lines=$(wc -l < "$PLAN_FILE" | tr -d ' ')
+
+    echo ""
+    log_success "Plan refresh complete!"
+    log_info "Previous plan: $original_lines lines -> New plan: $new_lines lines"
+    log_info "Archive: $archive_path"
+}
+
+main "$@"

+#!/bin/bash
+# =============================================================================
+# request.sh - Create @fix_plan.md for immediate task injection
+# =============================================================================
+# Creates a fix plan file that Ralph will process immediately, before any other
+# work. Use this for urgent tasks, bug fixes, or mid-course corrections.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority P1 "Critical security fix"
+#   ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --help
+#
+# =============================================================================
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# Colors
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+CYAN='\033[0;36m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+# Script directory
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+RALPH_DIR="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+
+# Output file
+FIX_PLAN_FILE="$RALPH_DIR/@fix_plan.md"
+
+# Options
+TEMPLATE="default"
+PRIORITY="P1"
+TITLE=""
+
+log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
+log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
+log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
+log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }
+
+show_help() {
+    cat << 'EOF'
+request.sh - Create @fix_plan.md for immediate task injection
+
+Usage:
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Task description"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template <type> "Task description"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority <P1|P2|P3> "Task description"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --help
+
+Templates:
+  default  - Generic task template
+  docs     - Documentation task
+  test     - Write tests for a component
+  fix      - Bug fix
+  feature  - New feature implementation
+
+Examples:
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh "Create API documentation"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template docs "Application startup guide"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template test "AuthService"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template fix "Login timeout bug"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --template feature "Dark mode toggle"
+  ./ralph/scripts/request.sh --priority P1 "Critical security fix"
+
+Output:
+  Creates ralph/@fix_plan.md - Ralph will process this immediately
+EOF
+}
+
+parse_args() {
+    while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+        case $1 in
+            -h|--help)
+                show_help
+                exit 0
+                ;;
+            --template|-t)
+                TEMPLATE="$2"
+                shift 2
+                ;;
+            --priority|-p)
+                PRIORITY="$2"
+                shift 2
+                ;;
+            *)
+                if [[ -z "$TITLE" ]]; then
+                    TITLE="$1"
+                else
+                    TITLE="$TITLE $1"
+                fi
+                shift
+                ;;
+        esac
+    done
+
+    if [[ -z "$TITLE" ]]; then
+        log_error "Task description is required"
+        echo ""
+        show_help
+        exit 1
+    fi
+}
+
+generate_default_template() {
+    cat << EOF
+# Immediate Task: $TITLE
+
+> **Priority**: $PRIORITY - Complete before any other work
+> **Created**: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+
+---
+
+## Objective
+
+$TITLE
+
+---
+
+## Deliverables
+
+1. [Specify deliverable]
+
+---
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] [Criterion 1]
+
+---
+
+## When Complete
+
+1. Verify all criteria are met
+2. Delete this file (\`ralph/@fix_plan.md\`)
+3. Output the completion signal below
+
+## Completion Signal
+
+<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
+EOF
+}
+
+generate_docs_template() {
+    cat << EOF
+# Immediate Task: Documentation - $TITLE
+
+> **Priority**: $PRIORITY - Complete before any other work
+> **Created**: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+
+---
+
+## Objective
+
+Create comprehensive documentation for $TITLE.
+
+---
+
+## Deliverables
+
+1. Documentation file in \`docs/\` or appropriate location
+2. Update \`ralph/AGENTS.md\` if operational commands involved
+
+---
+
+## Sections Required
+
+- Overview
+- Prerequisites
+- Step-by-step instructions
+- Verification steps
+- Troubleshooting
+
+---
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Documentation is complete and follows project style
+- [ ] Can follow docs from scratch without assumed knowledge
+- [ ] All code examples are tested
+
+---
+
+## When Complete
+
+1. Verify all criteria are met
+2. Delete this file (\`ralph/@fix_plan.md\`)
+3. Output the completion signal below
+
+## Completion Signal
+
+<promise>DOCS_COMPLETE</promise>
+EOF
+}
+
+generate_test_template() {
+    cat << EOF
+# Immediate Task: Tests - $TITLE
+
+> **Priority**: $PRIORITY - Complete before any other work
+> **Created**: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+
+---
+
+## Objective
+
+Write comprehensive tests for $TITLE.
+
+---
+
+## Deliverables
+
+1. Test file in appropriate \`__tests__/\` or \`*.test.ts\` location
+2. All tests passing
+
+---
+
+## Requirements
+
+- Unit tests for all public methods
+- Edge cases and error conditions
+- Integration tests if applicable
+
+---
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] All tests passing with \`bun test <path>\`
+- [ ] Coverage for main functionality
+- [ ] No regressions in existing tests
+
+---
+
+## When Complete
+
+1. Run \`bun test\` to verify all tests pass
+2. Delete this file (\`ralph/@fix_plan.md\`)
+3. Output the completion signal below
+
+## Completion Signal
+
+<promise>TESTS_COMPLETE</promise>
+EOF
+}
+
+generate_fix_template() {
+    cat << EOF
+# Immediate Task: Bug Fix - $TITLE
+
+> **Priority**: $PRIORITY - Complete before any other work
+> **Created**: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+
+---
+
+## Objective
+
+Fix the bug: $TITLE
+
+---
+
+## Investigation Steps
+
+1. Reproduce the issue
+2. Identify root cause
+3. Implement fix
+4. Add regression test
+
+---
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Bug is fixed and verified
+- [ ] Regression test added
+- [ ] All existing tests still pass
+- [ ] No new warnings introduced
+
+---
+
+## When Complete
+
+1. Verify all criteria are met
+2. Delete this file (\`ralph/@fix_plan.md\`)
+3. Output the completion signal below
+
+## Completion Signal
+
+<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>
+EOF
+}
+
+generate_feature_template() {
+    cat << EOF
+# Immediate Task: Feature - $TITLE
+
+> **Priority**: $PRIORITY - Complete before any other work
+> **Created**: $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
+
+---
+
+## Objective
+
+Implement feature: $TITLE
+
+---
+
+## Deliverables
+
+1. Feature implementation
+2. Tests for the feature
+3. Documentation if user-facing
+
+---
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Feature works as specified
+- [ ] Tests passing
+- [ ] No regressions
+- [ ] Code follows project conventions
+
+---
+
+## When Complete
+
+1. Verify all criteria are met
+2. Delete this file (\`ralph/@fix_plan.md\`)
+3. Output the completion signal below
+
+## Completion Signal
+
+<promise>FEATURE_COMPLETE</promise>
+EOF
+}
+
+main() {
+    parse_args "$@"
+
+    # Check if fix plan already exists
+    if [[ -f "$FIX_PLAN_FILE" ]]; then
+        log_warn "WARNING: $FIX_PLAN_FILE already exists!"
+        log_warn "Current content will be OVERWRITTEN."
+        echo ""
+        read -p "Continue? [y/N] " -n 1 -r
+        echo ""
+        if [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
+            log_info "Aborted."
+            exit 0
+        fi
+    fi
+
+    # Generate template
+    local content
+    case "$TEMPLATE" in
+        default)
+            content=$(generate_default_template)
+            ;;
+        docs)
+            content=$(generate_docs_template)
+            ;;
+        test)
+            content=$(generate_test_template)
+            ;;
+        fix)
+            content=$(generate_fix_template)
+            ;;
+        feature)
+            content=$(generate_feature_template)
+            ;;
+        *)
+            log_error "Unknown template: $TEMPLATE"
+            log_info "Available templates: default, docs, test, fix, feature"
+            exit 1
+            ;;
+    esac
+
+    # Write to file
+    echo "$content" > "$FIX_PLAN_FILE"
+
+    log_success "Created $FIX_PLAN_FILE"
+    log_info "Template: $TEMPLATE"
+    log_info "Priority: $PRIORITY"
+    log_info "Title: $TITLE"
+    echo ""
+    log_info "Run ./ralph/loop.sh to execute"
+}
+
+main "$@"

   124→# Cross-platform date from timestamp
   125→date_from_timestamp() {
   126→    local timestamp="$1"
   127→    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   128→        # GNU date (Linux)
   129→        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
   130→    else
   131→        # BSD date (macOS)
   132→        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
   133→    fi
   134→}

   200→check_for_errors() {

   224→push_changes() {
   225→    local branch="$1"
   226→    local max_retries=3
   227→    local retry=0
   228→    
   229→    while [[ $retry -lt $max_retries ]]; do
   230→        if git push origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
   231→            return 0
   232→        fi
   233→        
   234→        retry=$((retry + 1))
   235→        
   236→        if [[ $retry -eq 1 ]]; then
   237→            log_warn "Push failed. Trying to create remote branch..."
   238→            if git push -u origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
   239→                return 0
   240→            fi
   241→        fi
   242→        
   243→        log_warn "Push attempt $retry/$max_retries failed. Retrying in 5s..."
   244→        sleep 5
   245→    done
   246→    
   247→    return 1
   248→}
   249→
   250→# Run Claude CLI with retry logic for transient failures
   251→run_claude_with_retry() {
   252→    local prompt_file="$1"
   253→    local output_file="$2"
   254→    local mode="$3"
   255→    local retry=0
   256→    local exit_code
   257→    
   258→    while [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; do
   259→        if [[ "$mode" == "plan-work" ]]; then
   260→            envsubst < "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
   261→                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   262→                --output-format=stream-json \
   263→                --model "$MODEL" \
   264→                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
   265→            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   266→        else
   267→            cat "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
   268→                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   269→                --output-format=stream-json \
   270→                --model "$MODEL" \
   271→                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
   272→            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   273→        fi
   274→        
   275→        # Check for transient errors that should be retried
   276→        if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
   277→            return 0
   278→        fi
   279→        
   280→        # Check if it's a retryable error
   281→        if grep -qE "ETIMEDOUT|ECONNRESET|ECONNREFUSED|503|504|rate.?limit" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   282→            retry=$((retry + 1))
   283→            if [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; then
   284→                log_warn "Transient error detected. Retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s... (attempt $((retry + 1))/$MAX_RETRIES)"
   285→                sleep "$RETRY_DELAY"
   286→                continue
   287→            fi
   288→        fi
   289→        
   290→        # Non-retryable error or max retries reached
   291→        return $exit_code
   292→    done
   293→    
   294→    return 1
   295→}

#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Ralph Wiggum Loop - Production Hardened Version 2.1
# =============================================================================
# Based on Geoffrey Huntley's ORIGINAL method (external loop, clean context)
# 
# CRITICAL FIXES v2.1:
# 1. Claude CLI timeout configuration (CRITICAL - prevents 2-min kill)
# 2. API timeout configuration
# 3. Retry logic for transient failures
# 4. Cross-platform date compatibility (Linux/macOS)
# 5. bc dependency fallback
# 6. Fixed variable scope issues
# 7. Improved error handling
# =============================================================================

set -euo pipefail

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

# =============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION
# =============================================================================
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"

# Source circuit breaker
if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh" ]]; then
    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh"
    CB_ENABLED=true
else
    CB_ENABLED=false
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} circuit-breaker.sh not found - running without protection"
fi

# Ralph files
PROMPT_BUILD="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_build.md"
PROMPT_PLAN="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_plan.md"
PROMPT_PLAN_WORK="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_plan_work.md"
AGENTS_FILE="${SCRIPT_DIR}/AGENTS.md"
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN="${SCRIPT_DIR}/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"

# Default model
DEFAULT_MODEL="opus"

# Rate limiting
MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR=${MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR:-9999999}
CALLS_FILE="/tmp/ralph-calls-$(date +%Y%m%d%H)"

# Output capture
OUTPUT_DIR="/tmp/ralph-outputs-$$"
mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"

# =============================================================================
# TIMEOUT CONFIGURATION (CRITICAL)
# =============================================================================
# Claude CLI has a default 2-minute timeout on bash commands.
# This will kill long-running builds, tests, and optimizer runs!
# Configure these environment variables to extend timeouts.
#
# Reference: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/5615
# =============================================================================

# Bash command timeout (ms) - default 30 minutes
export BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS:-1800000}
# Maximum bash timeout (ms) - default 2 hours
export BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS:-7200000}
# API request timeout (ms) - default 10 minutes
export API_TIMEOUT_MS=${API_TIMEOUT_MS:-600000}
# MCP server startup timeout (ms) - default 30 seconds
export MCP_TIMEOUT=${MCP_TIMEOUT:-30000}
# Disable non-essential traffic (improves stability)
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=${CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC:-1}

# Retry configuration for Claude CLI calls
MAX_RETRIES=${MAX_RETRIES:-3}
RETRY_DELAY=${RETRY_DELAY:-5}

# Completion signals to detect
COMPLETION_SIGNALS=(
    "ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE"
    "PLAN_COMPLETE"
    "EXIT_SIGNAL"
    "<promise>DONE</promise>"
    "<promise>COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>PLAN_COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>FIX_COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>RALPH_BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>BLOCKED</promise>"
)

# =============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }

print_banner() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}"
    echo "╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗"
    echo "║     ██████╗  █████╗ ██╗     ██████╗ ██╗  ██╗                     ║"
    echo "║     ██╔══██╗██╔══██╗██║     ██╔══██╗██║  ██║                     ║"
    echo "║     ██████╔╝███████║██║     ██████╔╝███████║                     ║"
    echo "║     ██╔══██╗██╔══██║██║     ██╔═══╝ ██╔══██║                     ║"
    echo "║     ██║  ██║██║  ██║███████╗██║     ██║  ██║                     ║"
    echo "║     ╚═╝  ╚═╝╚═╝  ╚═╝╚══════╝╚═╝     ╚═╝  ╚═╝                     ║"
    echo "║                                                                  ║"
    echo "║     Metro Fleet Mileage Management System                        ║"
    echo "║     Production-Hardened Ralph Loop v2.1                          ║"
    echo "╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝"
    echo -e "${NC}"
}

# Cross-platform date from timestamp
date_from_timestamp() {
    local timestamp="$1"
    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # GNU date (Linux)
        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    else
        # BSD date (macOS)
        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    fi
}

check_rate_limit() {
    if [[ -f "$CALLS_FILE" ]]; then
        local calls
        calls=$(cat "$CALLS_FILE")
        if [[ $calls -ge $MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR ]]; then
            log_error "Rate limit reached: $MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR calls/hour"
            log_info "Reset in: $(( 60 - $(date +%M) )) minutes"
            return 1
        fi
    fi
    return 0
}

increment_call_count() {
    local current=0
    if [[ -f "$CALLS_FILE" ]]; then
        current=$(cat "$CALLS_FILE")
    fi
    echo $((current + 1)) > "$CALLS_FILE"
}

check_prerequisites() {
    if ! command -v claude &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Claude CLI not found. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-cli"
        exit 1
    fi

    if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Not in a git repository"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -f "$AGENTS_FILE" ]]; then
        log_error "AGENTS.md not found at: $AGENTS_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi
    
    # Check for jq (required for circuit breaker)
    if ! command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
        log_warn "jq not found - circuit breaker features limited"
        log_info "Install with: apt install jq (Linux) or brew install jq (macOS)"
    fi
    
    # Check for envsubst (required for plan-work mode)
    if ! command -v envsubst &> /dev/null; then
        log_warn "envsubst not found - plan-work mode may not work"
        log_info "Install with: apt install gettext-base (Linux) or brew install gettext (macOS)"
    fi
}

check_completion_signal() {
    local output_file="$1"

    for signal in "${COMPLETION_SIGNALS[@]}"; do
        # Case-insensitive matching (-i) for robustness
        if grep -qi "$signal" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "$signal"
            return 0
        fi
    done

    return 1
}

check_for_errors() {
    local output_file="$1"
    
    # Check for JSON error blocks
    if grep -q '"type":"error"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep '"type":"error"' "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Check for common error patterns
    if grep -qE "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep -E "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Check for API timeout errors
    if grep -qE "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep -E "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    return 1
}

push_changes() {
    local branch="$1"
    local max_retries=3
    local retry=0
    
    while [[ $retry -lt $max_retries ]]; do
        if git push origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
            return 0
        fi
        
        retry=$((retry + 1))
        
        if [[ $retry -eq 1 ]]; then
            log_warn "Push failed. Trying to create remote branch..."
            if git push -u origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
                return 0
            fi
        fi
        
        log_warn "Push attempt $retry/$max_retries failed. Retrying in 5s..."
        sleep 5
    done
    
    return 1
}

# Run Claude CLI with retry logic for transient failures
run_claude_with_retry() {
    local prompt_file="$1"
    local output_file="$2"
    local mode="$3"
    local retry=0
    local exit_code
    
    while [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; do
        if [[ "$mode" == "plan-work" ]]; then
            envsubst < "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
                --output-format=stream-json \
                --model "$MODEL" \
                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
        else
            cat "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
                --output-format=stream-json \
                --model "$MODEL" \
                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
        fi
        
        # Check for transient errors that should be retried
        if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
            return 0
        fi
        
        # Check if it's a retryable error
        if grep -qE "ETIMEDOUT|ECONNRESET|ECONNREFUSED|503|504|rate.?limit" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            retry=$((retry + 1))
            if [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; then
                log_warn "Transient error detected. Retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s... (attempt $((retry + 1))/$MAX_RETRIES)"
                sleep "$RETRY_DELAY"
                continue
            fi
        fi
        
        # Non-retryable error or max retries reached
        return $exit_code
    done
    
    return 1
}

cleanup() {
    rm -rf "$OUTPUT_DIR"
    log_info "Cleaned up temporary files"
}

show_usage() {
    echo "Usage: ./loop.sh [MODE] [OPTIONS]"
    echo ""
    echo "Modes:"
    echo "  (none)              Build mode, unlimited iterations"
    echo "  <number>            Build mode, max N iterations"
    echo "  plan                Planning mode, unlimited"
    echo "  plan <number>       Planning mode, max N iterations"
    echo "  plan-work \"desc\"    Scoped planning for specific work"
    echo ""
    echo "Examples:"
    echo "  ./loop.sh                          # Build, unlimited"
    echo "  ./loop.sh 50                       # Build, max 50 iterations"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan                     # Plan, unlimited"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan 5                   # Plan, max 5 iterations"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan-work \"ingestion\"    # Scoped plan"
    echo ""
    echo "Options:"
    echo "  -h, --help              Show this help"
    echo "  -m, --model MODEL       Use specific model (default: opus)"
    echo "  -v, --verbose           Verbose output"
    echo "  --no-push               Skip git push after iterations"
    echo "  --no-stop-on-complete   Continue even after completion signal"
    echo ""
    echo "Environment Variables:"
    echo "  MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR          Rate limit (default: 100)"
    echo "  CB_MAX_COST_USD             Circuit breaker cost limit (default: 50)"
    echo "  CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD    Iterations without commit (default: 3)"
    echo ""
    echo "Timeout Configuration (CRITICAL for long operations):"
    echo "  BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS     Bash command timeout (default: 1800000 = 30min)"
    echo "  BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS         Max bash timeout (default: 7200000 = 2hr)"
    echo "  API_TIMEOUT_MS              API request timeout (default: 600000 = 10min)"
    echo ""
    echo "Safety:"
    echo "  Ctrl+C                  Stop the loop"
    echo "  git reset --hard        Revert uncommitted changes"
    echo "  ./circuit-breaker.sh reset  Reset circuit breaker state"
}

# =============================================================================
# PARSE ARGUMENTS
# =============================================================================

MODE="build"
PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_BUILD"
MAX_ITERATIONS=0
WORK_DESCRIPTION=""
MODEL="$DEFAULT_MODEL"
VERBOSE=""
NO_PUSH=true
STOP_ON_COMPLETE=true

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case $1 in
        -h|--help)
            show_usage
            exit 0
            ;;
        -m|--model)
            MODEL="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -v|--verbose)
            VERBOSE="--verbose"
            shift
            ;;
        --no-push)
            NO_PUSH=true
            shift
            ;;
        --no-stop-on-complete)
            STOP_ON_COMPLETE=false
            shift
            ;;
        plan)
            MODE="plan"
            PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_PLAN"
            shift
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
                MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
                shift
            fi
            ;;
        plan-work)
            MODE="plan-work"
            PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_PLAN_WORK"
            shift
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && ! "$1" =~ ^- ]]; then
                WORK_DESCRIPTION="$1"
                shift
            else
                log_error "plan-work requires a work description"
                echo "Usage: ./loop.sh plan-work \"description of work\""
                exit 1
            fi
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
                MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
                shift
            else
                MAX_ITERATIONS=5
            fi
            ;;
        [0-9]*)
            MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
            shift
            ;;
        *)
            log_error "Unknown option: $1"
            show_usage
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
done

# =============================================================================
# VALIDATION
# =============================================================================

check_prerequisites

if [[ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]]; then
    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

if [[ "$MODE" == "plan-work" ]]; then
    CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
    if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "main" || "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "master" ]]; then
        log_error "plan-work should be run on a work branch, not main/master"
        echo "Create a work branch first: git checkout -b ralph/your-work"
        exit 1
    fi
    export WORK_SCOPE="$WORK_DESCRIPTION"
fi

# Initialize circuit breaker
if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
    cb_init
    log_info "Circuit breaker initialized (cost limit: \$${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-9999999})"
fi

# =============================================================================
# MAIN LOOP
# =============================================================================

print_banner

CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
ITERATION=0
START_TIME=$(date +%s)

echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
log_info "Mode:       ${YELLOW}$MODE${NC}"
log_info "Branch:     ${CYAN}$CURRENT_BRANCH${NC}"
log_info "Prompt:     $PROMPT_FILE"
log_info "Model:      $MODEL"
[[ $MAX_ITERATIONS -gt 0 ]] && log_info "Max:        $MAX_ITERATIONS iterations"
[[ -n "$WORK_DESCRIPTION" ]] && log_info "Work:       $WORK_DESCRIPTION"
log_info "Circuit:    $([[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]] && echo "ENABLED" || echo "DISABLED")"
log_info "Auto-stop:  $([[ "$STOP_ON_COMPLETE" == "true" ]] && echo "on completion signal" || echo "manual only")"
log_info "Timeouts:   Bash=${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS}ms API=${API_TIMEOUT_MS}ms"
if [[ "$NO_PUSH" == "true" ]]; then
    log_warn "NO_PUSH=true: Work is LOCAL ONLY. Run 'git push' manually or set NO_PUSH=false"
fi
echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
echo ""

# Trap for cleanup
trap 'echo ""; log_warn "Loop interrupted by user"; cleanup; exit 130' INT TERM

while true; do
    # Check iteration limit
    if [[ $MAX_ITERATIONS -gt 0 && $ITERATION -ge $MAX_ITERATIONS ]]; then
        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
        
        if [[ "$MODE" == "plan-work" ]]; then
            echo ""
            echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
            log_success "Scoped plan created for: $WORK_DESCRIPTION"
            log_info "To build, run: ./loop.sh 50"
            echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
        fi
        break
    fi

    # Check rate limit
    if ! check_rate_limit; then
        log_error "Rate limit exceeded. Stopping."
        break
    fi

    # Check circuit breaker
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        CB_RESULT=$(cb_check_circuit 2>&1) || {
            log_error "Circuit breaker OPEN: $CB_RESULT"
            echo ""
            cb_status
            echo ""
            log_info "To reset: ./circuit-breaker.sh reset"
            break
        }
    fi

    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
    ELAPSED=$(($(date +%s) - START_TIME))
    OUTPUT_FILE="$OUTPUT_DIR/iteration-$ITERATION.json"
    
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}  ITERATION $ITERATION  │  Elapsed: ${ELAPSED}s  │  Branch: $CURRENT_BRANCH${NC}"
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        cb_state=$(cb_get_state 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
        cb_cost=$(echo "$cb_state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost // 0' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        echo -e "${BLUE}  Est. Cost: \$${cb_cost}  │  Limit: \$${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-9999999}${NC}"
    fi
    echo -e "${BLUE}══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════${NC}"
    echo ""

    # ==========================================================================
    # CORE RALPH LOOP - Clean Context on Each Iteration
    # ==========================================================================

    # Run pre-iteration hook (informational warnings)
    if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/hooks/pre-iteration.sh" ]]; then
        source "$SCRIPT_DIR/hooks/pre-iteration.sh" || true
    fi

    ITER_START=$(date +%s)

    # Run Claude with retry logic
    run_claude_with_retry "$PROMPT_FILE" "$OUTPUT_FILE" "$MODE"

    ITER_END=$(date +%s)
    ITER_DURATION=$((ITER_END - ITER_START))
    
    # Record call for rate limiting
    increment_call_count

    # Record iteration for circuit breaker
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        cb_record_iteration
    fi

    # Check for errors in output
    if ERROR_MSG=$(check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_FILE"); then
        log_warn "Error detected: $ERROR_MSG"
        if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
            cb_record_error "$ERROR_MSG"
        fi
    fi

    # Check for completion signals
    if [[ "$STOP_ON_COMPLETE" == "true" ]]; then
        if SIGNAL=$(check_completion_signal "$OUTPUT_FILE"); then
            log_success "Completion signal detected: $SIGNAL"
            
            # Push final changes before exit
            if [[ "$NO_PUSH" == "false" ]]; then
                CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
                push_changes "$CURRENT_BRANCH" || log_warn "Final push failed"
            fi
            
            break
        fi
    fi

    # Push changes
    if [[ "$NO_PUSH" == "false" ]]; then
        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
        if ! push_changes "$CURRENT_BRANCH"; then
            log_error "CRITICAL: Cannot push to remote after 3 retries."
            log_error "Work is only local! Stopping to prevent data loss."
            log_info "Fix credentials and run: git push origin $CURRENT_BRANCH"
            break
        fi
    fi

    log_success "Iteration $ITERATION completed (${ITER_DURATION}s)"
done

# =============================================================================
# SUMMARY
# =============================================================================

cleanup

TOTAL_TIME=$(($(date +%s) - START_TIME))
echo ""

log_success "Ralph loop completed!"
log_info "Total iterations: $ITERATION"
log_info "Total time: ${TOTAL_TIME}s"
log_info "Avg time/iteration: $((TOTAL_TIME / (ITERATION > 0 ? ITERATION : 1)))s"

fi

echo "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"
